title: Diplocyclos decipiens
taxonomy: Diplocyclos decipiens is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Cucurbitaceae, commonly known as the gourd family. This plant belongs to the genus Diplocyclos, which consists of a few species of tropical and subtropical vines. Within the family Cucurbitaceae, Diplocyclos decipiens is a part of the subfamily Cucurbitoideae, which includes a variety of gourd-producing plants. The classification of Diplocyclos decipiens is further supported by its morphological characteristics, such as its ovate leaves and yellow flowers. Through its classification, scientists can better understand the evolutionary relationships and diversity within the Cucurbitaceae family.
